2603.17478.title: Auto-Unrolled Proximal Gradient Descent: An AutoML Approach to Interpretable Waveform Optimization
2603.17478.paper_summary: This study explores the combination of automated machine learning (AutoML) with model-based deep unfolding (DU) for optimizing wireless beamforming and waveforms. We convert the iterative proximal gradient descent (PGD) algorithm into a deep neural network, wherein the parameters of each layer are learned instead of being predetermined. Additionally, we enhance the architecture by incorporating a hybrid layer that performs a learnable linear gradient transformation prior to the proximal projection. By utilizing AutoGluon with a tree-structured parzen estimator (TPE) for hyperparameter optimization (HPO) across an expanded search space, which includes network depth, step-size initialization, optimizer, learning rate scheduler, layer type, and post-gradient activation, the proposed auto-unrolled PGD (Auto-PGD) achieves 98.8% of the spectral efficiency of a traditional 200-iteration PGD solver using only five unrolled layers, while requiring only 100 training samples. We also address a gradient normalization issue to ensure consistent performance during training and evaluation, and we illustrate per-layer sum-rate logging as a tool for transparency. These contributions highlight a notable reduction in the amount of training data and inference cost required, while maintaining high interpretability compared to conventional black-box architectures.
2603.17478.paper_summary_zh: 這項研究探討自動化機器學習（AutoML）與基於模型的深度展開（DU）結合，以優化無線波束形成和波形。我們將迭代的近端梯度下降（PGD）算法轉換為深度神經網絡，其中每一層的參數是學習得到的，而不是預先設定的。此外，我們通過引入一個混合層來增強架構，該層在近端投影之前執行可學習的線性梯度變換。通過利用 AutoGluon 和樹狀 Parzen 估計器（TPE）進行超參數優化（HPO），在擴展的搜索空間中，包括網絡深度、步長初始化、優化器、學習率調度器、層類型和後梯度激活，所提出的自動展開 PGD（Auto-PGD）在僅使用五個展開層的情況下，達到了傳統 200 次迭代 PGD 求解器 98.8% 的光譜效率，同時僅需 100 個訓練樣本。我們還解決了梯度正規化問題，以確保在訓練和評估過程中的一致性能，並展示每層的總速率日誌作為透明度的工具。這些貢獻突顯了所需訓練數據和推理成本的顯著減少，同時與傳統的黑箱架構相比，保持了高可解釋性。
2603.17478.author: Ahmet Kaplan et.al.
